title: UP Scholarship Online Form 2025-26
content:
UP Scholarship Online Form 2025-26

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:21 pm

Social Welfare Department of Uttar Pradesh, has released the notification for the UP Scholarship 2025-26 for students of Class 9–10 (Pre-Matric), Class 11–12 (Post-Matric), and Post-Matric Other Than Intermediate. The online application process will be open from 02 July 2025 to 30 October 2025 for Pre-Matric and Post-Matric, and from 10 July 2025 to 20 December 2025 for Post-Matric Other Than Intermediate. Interested candidates must check the eligibility criteria, age limit, and read the full notification before applying. Eligible students can submit their applications online within the given dates.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

UP Scholarship Online Form 2025-26

UP Scholarship Scheme 2025-26 : Short Details

  • 09-10th Pre Matric 
  • Online Apply Start Date : 02 July 2025
  • Online Apply Last Date : 30 October 2025
  • Last Date For Form Complete : 31 October 2025
  • Last Date For Submission of Hard Copy To College : 04 November 2025
  • Send Scholarship in Bank Account Date : 31 December 2025
  • 11th-12th Post Matric 
  • Online Apply Start Date : 02 July 2025
  • Online Apply Last Date : 30 October 2025
  • Last Date For Form Complete : 31 October 2025
  • Last Date For Submission of Hard Copy To College : 04 November 2025
  • Send Scholarship in Bank Account Date : 31 December 2025
  • Post Matric Other than Intermediate 
  • Online Apply Start Date : 10 July 2025
  • Online Apply Last Date : 20 December 2025
  • Last Date For Form Complete : 20 December 2025
  • Last Date For Submission of Hard Copy To College : 24 December 2025
  • Send Scholarship in Bank Account Date : 24 January 2026

Application Fee

  • No Application Fee For Any Candidates

 UP Scholarship Online Form 2025-26 : Document Required 
  • Candidates have to attach the following documents along with the Hard copy of the Online Application Form:
  • Last Qualifying Exam Mark Sheet
  • Caste Certificate
  • Income Certificate
  • Bank Passbook
  • Fee Receipt Number

Scholarship Name For Class
Pre Matric Class 09th & Class 10th
Post Matric Class 11th & Class 12th
Dashmottar UG / PG / Diploma & Certificate Courses

 

Criteria Eligibility
Domicile
  • Candidates hailing from Uttar Pradesh and having Domicile of Uttar Pradesh can only avail this Scholarship facility.
Pre Matric
  • For Class 09th candidates they should clear their class 8th level of examination and enrolled with Class 09th & For Class 10th candidates they should clear their class 09th level of examination and enrolled with Class 10th can fill this Scholarship Form.
Post Matric
  • For Class 11th candidates they should clear their class 10th level of examination and enrolled with Class 11h & For Class 12th candidates they should clear their class 11th level of examination and enrolled with Class 12th can fill this Scholarship Form.
Dashmottar
  • Candidates must be enrolled in any UG / PG / Diploma / Certificate Examination can fill up this scholarship form.

 

 

 How To Fill UP Scholarship Online Form 2025-26 
  • Interested candidates who wish to apply for the UP Scholarship post can submit their application online before 20 December 2025.
  • Use the click here link provided below under important link section to apply directly.
  • Alternatively, visit the official website of UP Scholarship to complete the application process online.
  • Make sure to complete the application before the deadline  20 December 2025.

 

 UP Scholarship Form For Offline Submission 2025 
  • After filling the Online Scholarship Form candidates need to take the print put of complete form and after that they have to attach relevant documents (specified above) & are required to send it to the respective College / School / Institution before due Date.

title: PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2026
content:
PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2026

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:17 pm

The PAN (Permanent Account Number) is an essential document for Indian citizens. All individuals who have registered for a PAN card can track its status online through the official websites of UTI or NSDL. On these official PAN portals, you can apply for a new PAN card, check the status of your application, make corrections, and update your PAN details. Use the link below to access these services.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2026

PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2025

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Application Start : Already Start
  • Last Date for Apply Online : Not Available

Application Fee

  • Indian Citizen All Category : Rs. 107/-
  • Indian Citizen Resident in Abroad Pan Card Registration Dispatched Fee : Rs. 989/-
  • Pay the Registration Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Fee Through Offline.
NA

PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2026

Total Post
NA
Download SarkariResult App Now
PAN Card Registration, Correction & Other Service 2026
 What is the Pan Card 
  • The Permanent Account Number (PAN) is a crucial identification document for taxpayers in India. It is essential to ensure that the information on your PAN card is accurate and up to date. This article provides a clear guide on how to correct or update your PAN details through both online and offline methods. It also outlines the required forms, documents, and applicable fees to help you complete the process smoothly and efficiently.

 

 How to Change PAN Card Details 
  • There may be errors in your name, your parent’s name, or your date of birth when your PAN card is issued. Additionally, your name or address may change after the card has been issued. In such cases, it is important to update the PAN card with the correct information, including your name, parent’s name, address, or date of birth. You can update these details either online or offline.

 

 Document Required for Pan Card 
  • Aadhar Card
  • Voter Identify Card (Voter ID)
  • Arms License
  • Passport
  • Driving License (DL)
  • Pension Card with Photograph
  • Ration Card
  • Photo ID Card Issued By Any Central / State Government Authority
  • Any Other Related Supported Document

 

 How to Apply For New PAN Card 
  • Click on ” New PAN Card Registration” Tab to fill online Application form for New PAN card.
  • Now Fill your PAN Card application form online 
  • Select your Required Documents which you have
  • Click on Submit
  • Verify your details and click on Proceed to Payment Button.
  • Make payment This is one time fee. No Hidden or extra cost.
  • After successful Payment, download and print your pre-filled application form (along with Instruction sheet and Blank Application Form).
  • Paste photo, sign, attach documents and post to address (You will get the postal address in instruction sheet.)
  • Now you will get your pan card to your address within 30 Days .

title: Aadhar Card Download, Correction, Status 2026
content:
Aadhar Card Download, Correction, Status 2026

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:14 pm

The Aadhaar card, issued by the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI), is also popularly known as “My Aadhaar, My Identity.” It serves as a unique identification document for every resident of India. This guide provides complete information on how to download the Aadhaar card, update it, change the registered mobile number, update the address, and make necessary corrections. You can also learn how to download your Aadhaar card directly from your mobile. All important details related to Aadhaar card services and registration are provided below, along with the application link in the section.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

Aadhar Card Download, Correction, Status 2026

Aadhar Card Download, Correction, Status 2026
 Aadhar Card Facility 
  • Aadhar Card Enrollment
  • Download E Aadhar
  • Online Correction
  • Find UID and All Services of UIDAI

 

 How to Enrolled With New Aadhar 
  • Find Your Nearest Enrollment Center to Choose Your State Name, District Name and Area.
  • Visit the center to submit your documents, along with a photograph and biometric details.
  • After a few days, your e-Aadhaar will be available for download from the official portal.

 

 Online Correction E Aadhar Card 
  • After the Successfully Generating the Aadhar Card if you See Any Correction in Aadhar Card.
  • For Any Correction Kindly Use Only Aadhar Card Correction Online or Enrollment Center.
  • After the Over the Correction Procedure Wait for the Few Days and Download E Aadhar.

 

 Document Required For New Aadhar Card Enrollment 
Photo ID Card
  • Passport, PAN Card, Ration/ PDS Photo Card, Voter ID, Driving License Etc.
Address Proof
  • Passport, Bank Statement/ Passbook, Post Office Account Statement/ Passbook , Ration Card ,Voter ID ,Driving License, Government Photo ID cards/ service photo identity card issued by PSU . Electricity Bill (not older than 3 months) , Water Bill (not older than 3 months) . Telephone Landline Bill (not older than 3 months), Property Tax Receipt (not older than 1 year) Etc.
Date of Birth
  • Birth Certificate, SSLC Book / Certificate, Passport, Photo ID card having Date of Birth, PAN Card, Marksheet, Etc.

 

 How to Download E Aadhar Card 
  • In order to print, verify or correct the Aadhar card, the applicant should open the official website of UIDAI.
  • Here the candidates will have to click on the useful link as per their requirements.
  • Applicants can get the electronic version of Aadhar Card by entering the Enrolment ID received at the time of enrolment in the registered mobile number.
  • Applicants who have enrolled for Aadhar Card can check their Aadhar generation status by providing the enrolment ID and their Date of Birth.
  • In order to get Online /Offline Aadhar form (Hindi/English) and Update /Correction Form (Online/Offline) applicants shall be required to open the useful links as per their requirements.

title: UP Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Verification 2026
content:
UP Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Verification 2026

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:11 pm

The Uttar Pradesh Board of Revenue (UP BOR) offers an online platform for the search and verification of UP Income, Caste, and Domicile Certificates. Through the UP Document/Certificate Verification Portal, users can search for and verify certificates and documents for various government services, ensuring their authenticity. This allows candidates to confirm whether their documents are genuine or fraudulent. For more details, visit Sarkariresult.com.cm

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

UP Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Verification 2026

UP Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Verification 2026 : Short Details

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Application Start : Already Start
  • Last Date for Apply Online : Not Available

Application Fee

  • There is no application fee required for registration, checking, or verification of Caste, Income, and Domicile Certificates. Simply visit the provided link and enter your Praman Patra Number to check the status.
NA

आय प्रमाणपत्र, जाति प्रमाणपत्र, निवास प्रमाणपत्र सत्यापन

Total Post
NA
Download SarkariResult App Now
UP Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026
 Which Certificate Verify 
  • Income Certificate
  • Caste Certificate
  • Domicile Certificate

 

 Process for Search Old Certificate 
  • Enter Your Certificate 11 digit Code and Check the Status Link
  • Enter the Certificate No. to Search Status of Certificate.

 

 Process for Search New Certificate 
  • Search Your New Certificate / E District Verification (12 Digit Code)
  • Click On the New Certificate Link. and after that fill in 12 digit code and then verify that’s original.

 

 Benefits of Online Certificate Verification 
  • The process of verifying the UP Income, Caste, and Domicile Certificates is crucial to ensure that only eligible candidates receive the benefits and reservations. It plays a key role in preventing fraudulent or false claims, ensuring that deserving individuals are not denied their rightful entitlements.

 

 UP Online Certificate Verification Process 
  • After obtaining the certificate, the candidate must upload it to the official UP Revenue Department website for verification. The website offers an online portal where the candidate can enter the necessary information and upload the required documents for the verification process.
  • Additionally, the website provides a tracking feature that allows the candidate to monitor the status of their certificate verification. To check the status, the candidate simply needs to enter their application number, date of birth, and the captcha code on the website.
  • If the certificate is verified as valid and authentic, the candidate will receive a verification certificate. This certificate must be presented during the admission or recruitment process in order to access any associated benefits or reservations. On the other hand, if the certificate is determined to be invalid or fraudulent, the candidate could face legal consequences.

 

 Documents Required for UP Caste, Income Certificate Online Apply 
  • Aadhaar Card
  • Ration Card (optional)
  • Voter ID / PAN Card
  • Recent Passport Size Photo
  • Caste Proof (family or relative’s old caste certificate)
  • Self-declaration form (download from portal)
  • Domicile Certificate of UP
  • Income Certificate (for OBC creamy layer)

 

 How to Check Certificate Online 
  • Candidates have to open the official website of bor.up.nic.in
  • And Click on BOR UP Certificate Verification Online 2026 Board of Revenue
  • And you will see All links for the Check All Certificate.
  • Click on Any Certificate.
  • Enter your 11 or 12 Digit Certificate Code.
  • That’s Done.
  • UP Income | Caste | Domicile Certificate Verification 2026 Last Date is NA

title: Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026 : Short Details
content:
Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026 : Short Details

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:09 pm

The Right to Public Service (RTPS) Bihar, under the e-District Mission Mode Project, is accepting online applications for various certificates, including Residential Certificate, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Character Certificate, NCL Certificate, and EWS Certificate. All eligible and interested male and female applicants can apply online through the official RTPS Bihar portal at serviceonline.bihar.gov.in for Nivas Praman Patra, Jati Praman Patra, Aay Praman Patra, Charitra Praman Patra, as well as NCL and EWS certificates.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026

Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Application Start : Already Start
  • Last Date for Apply Online : Not Available

Application Fee

  • There is no application fee required for registration, checking, or verification of Caste, Income, and Domicile Certificates. Simply visit the provided link and enter your Praman Patra Number to check the status.
NA

Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Registration, Apply & Verification 2026

Total Post
NA
Download SarkariResult App Now
Bihar Income, Cast, Residential Certificate Online Apply & Verification 2026
 RTPS Bihar Key Highlights 
Service Name Right to Public Service, Bihar
Project Name e-District is a Mission Mode Project
Portal Name RTPS Bihar
RTPS Services List Residential Certificate, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Character Certificate, NCL and EWS Certificate etc.
Link Status Working
RTPS Bihar Website Link serviceonline.bihar.gov.in
Helpline Email [email protected]

 

 Purpose of RTPS Bihar Online Application 
  • The process of obtaining essential certificates like income, caste, and residency from government offices has traditionally been long and time-consuming. To simplify this, the state government has introduced an online platform.
  • This new facility allows residents to conveniently apply for these certificates from their homes, requiring only an internet connection. By eliminating the need to visit offices and endure long waits, it saves both time and effort for the public.

 

 RTPS Bihar Important Information 
  • The caste of an individual is determined based on the caste of their father, not that of their husband.
  • The validity of the caste certificate is permanent.
  • The validity of a permanent residence certificate is always valid, whereas the validity of a temporary residence certificate is for one year from the date of issue.
  • The validity of an income certificate is for one year from the date of issue.
  • After verification, the original certificates will be returned to the candidates.
  • Candidates can submit an undertaking in the prescribed format regarding not being in the creamy layer, based on which a new certificate without the creamy layer can be issued, using the old certificate without the creamy layer.
  • There is no need to repeatedly obtain a certificate without the creamy layer. For state services, an application can be submitted with an old certificate along with an undertaking.

 

 RTPS Bihar Apply Online Method 
  • Visit the official website serviceonline.bihar.gov.in.
  • If the applicant is a new user, create a Login ID and Password by selecting “Register Yourself.”
  • From the left menu on the website, click on the relevant department’s linked service and log in.
  • Click on “Apply for Service” from the left menu.
  • Fill out the application form carefully, upload your photo via Webcam or File Browser, make necessary corrections, and click Save Draft.
  • (a) If the service requires an Aadhaar number, an OTP will be sent to the mobile number registered with the applicant’s Aadhaar for verification, or (b) upload one of the 12 identification documents approved by the Election Commission of India.
  • If required for the specific service, attach the necessary annexures by clicking Attach.
  • Carefully read the application form and annexure list and make necessary corrections.
  • Submit the application and download/print the acknowledgment.
  • After the certificate is issued, it will be available in the applicant’s inbox. The applicant can log in to the website to download/print the certificate.

 

 How To Download RTPS Bihar Certificate 
  • Visit the official RTPS Bihar website at serviceonline.bihar.gov.in.
  • On the homepage, under the “Citizen Section” on the right-hand side, click the link titled “Download Certificate.”
  • You will be directed to the RTPS Download Certificate page.
  • From the drop-down menu, choose “RTPS/Others” under Services.
  • Enter your Application Ref. Number (e.g., BICCO/2021/0000) and Applicant Name (in English).
  • Finally, click on the “Download Certificate” button to retrieve your certificate from RTPS server 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and so on.
  • Note: Ensure you download your certificate only 24 hours after the execution of your application.

 

 RTPS Bihar Application Status 
  • Visit the official RTPS Bihar website at serviceonline.bihar.gov.in.
  • On the homepage, under the “Citizen Section” on the right-hand side, click the link labeled “Track Application Status.”
  • You will be directed to the Track Application Status page.
  • Choose how you want to track your application: either by Application Reference Number or OTP/Application Details.
  • If selecting Application Reference Number, enter it accurately in the provided field and choose to track via the Application Submission Date or Application Delivery Date.
  • Then, type the Word Verification Code shown on the page correctly to proceed.
  • Finally, click the “Submit” button to view the status of your application across RTPS servers 1, 2, 3, and so on.

title: Voter ID Registration & Other Voter Service 2026
content:
Voter ID Registration & Other Voter Service 2026

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:03 pm

The Voter ID, officially called the Election Photo Identity Card (EPIC), is a photo identification document issued by the Election Commission of India (ECI) to Indian citizens who are eligible to vote. Its main purpose is to verify a voter’s identity, enhance the efficiency of the voting process, and help prevent impersonation and electoral fraud during democratic elections. It is also popularly referred to as an election card, voter’s card, or simply a Voter ID card.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

Voter ID Registration & Other Voter Service 2026

Voter ID Card Online Form 2026 : Short Details

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Application Start : Already Start
  • Last Date for Apply Online : Not Available

Application Fee

  • No application fee is required to fill out the NVSP Online Voter ID Registration Form (only standard form charges may apply)
NA

Voter ID Card Registration 2026

Total Post
NA
Download SarkariResult App Now
Voter ID Card Online Registration Form 2026
 Structure of Voter ID 
In India, a voter ID card serves as a valid form of personal identification since it is issued by an official government authority. It includes the following information.

  • A unique Serial number (EPIC Number)
  • Photograph of the cardholder
  • A hologram containing the respective state/national symbol
  • Name of cardholder
  • Father’s Name of cardholder
  • Gender of cardholder
  • Card holder’s Date of Birth

 

 Voter ID Card Eligibility 
To qualify for a Voter ID card, individuals must satisfy the following requirements.

  • An Indian citizen
  • Must be aged 18 years or above
  • Must have a permanent address

 

 Documents Required For Voter ID Card 
Applying for a Voters ID requires you to submit the following documents.

  • Passport size color Photograph
  • Identity Proof
  • Address Proof

 

 How to Apply for Voter ID Card Online 
  • Step 1: Go to the official National Voters’ Services Portal (NVSP) website.
  • Step 2: On the homepage, locate and click the ‘Sign-Up’ button at the top right corner.
  • Step 3: Provide your mobile number, email address, and the captcha code, then click ‘Continue’.
  • Step 4: Fill in your ‘First Name’, ‘Last Name’, set a ‘Password’, confirm it, and press ‘Request OTP’.
  • Step 5: Enter the OTP received on your mobile number and email, then click ‘Verify’.
  • Step 6: After verification, click on ‘Login’. Enter your mobile number, password, captcha code, and then click ‘Request OTP’.
  • Step 7: Input the OTP sent to your mobile device and click the ‘Verify & Login’ button.
  • Step 8: Once logged in, select the ‘Fill Form 6’ option under the ‘New registration for general electors’ section.
  • Step 9: Complete Form 6 by entering your personal information, details of relatives, contact information, Aadhaar number, date of birth, address, and a declaration. Upload all necessary documents in the designated sections, then click ‘Preview and Submit’.
  • Step 10: Review all the entered information carefully. If everything is correct, click on ‘Submit’.

 

 How to Apply for Voter ID Card Offline 
  • Step 1: Visit the nearest State Election Office and request Form 6.
  • Step 2: Fill in the Form 6 with the required details.
  • Step 3: Submit the completed Form 6 along with a photo and supporting documents at the Election Office.

  • After that, enter the Village/Area Name in the given box.
  • Finally, input your Khasara Number in the appropriate field.
  • You will then be able to view and verify the land record and related details.

 How To Check & Verify UP Dakhil Kharij Bhulekh Online 2026 

  • Visit the UP Bhulekh Portal:

    • Go to the official website: https://upbhulekh.gov.in​

    • Access the Mutation Service:

    • On the homepage, click on the “Apply for Mutation (Dakhil Kharij)” option.​

  • Fill in the Application Form:

    • Provide necessary details such as property information, reason for mutation, and personal details.

    • Upload required documents like the sale deed, death certificate, identity proof, etc.​UP Bhulekh

  • Submit the Application:

    • After filling in all details and uploading documents, submit the application.

    • You will receive an acknowledgment number for future reference.​
